channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: The Noise Boys Ride Again
item.description:
Josh, Zac, and Brennan name mobsters and try to hide their bald spots.

Duration: 35:33

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, josh ruben, zac oyama, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Make Some Noise Season 4 Trailer
item.description:
The band’s getting back together. New season premieres October 13th.

Duration: 02:09

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation
